Error Analysis

Error Summary

PropertyValue
Total errors?
False positives165
False negatives189
Hard FP (≥75%)?
Hard FN (≥75%)?
Uncertain?
Clinical costNaN

Failure Modes

  • High-confidence errors: 130 predictions are ≥75% confident but wrong (106 FN, 24 FP). These subjects may have atypical presentations not captured in training.
  • Site-specific failure: site '3' has 45% error rate vs best-site 22%. Causes: scanner differences, acquisition protocol variation, inadequate ComBat harmonisation.

Recommendations

  • [P1 — Clinical Risk] Investigate 106 hard FNs: ASD subjects confidently misclassified as TC. Review their MRI and genetic profiles for unusual presentations. Consider data augmentation targeted at these subjects.
  • [P2 — Calibration] Mean confidence in errors = 0.705. Apply temperature scaling or Platt scaling post-training to reduce overconfidence. Ensemble methods (MC Dropout, Deep Ensembles) also reduce miscalibration.
  • [P3 — Site Generalisation] Site '3' has 45% error rate. Apply site-specific ComBat harmonisation, or add site as a conditioning variable in the model (site-adaptive normalisation).
  • [P5 — Uncertainty] 364/1100 (33%) predictions are near the decision boundary. Consider adding uncertainty quantification (MC Dropout, evidential deep learning) and routing uncertain cases for expert review.

Configuration
{
  "project": {
    "name": "ASD_Multimodal_Detection",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "description": "Multimodal ASD detection using structural MRI and genetic data",
    "random_seed": 42,
    "device": "cuda",
    "mixed_precision": true,
    "num_workers": 4,
    "pin_memory": true
  },
  "paths": {
    "root": "e:/ASD_forever",
    "data_raw_mri": "datasets/raw/mri",
    "data_raw_genetics": "datasets/raw/genetics",
    "data_processed_mri": "abide_processed/mri",
    "data_processed_genetics": "abide_processed/gen",
    "splits": "datasets/splits",
    "saved_models": "saved_models",
    "results": "results",
    "figures": "results/figures",
    "tables": "results/tables",
    "reports": "results/reports",
    "paper_figures": "paper/figures",
    "logs": "results/logs"
  },
  "dataset": {
    "name": "ABIDE_I",
    "mri_modality": "func_preproc",
    "genetic_type": "gene_expression",
    "abide_pipeline": "cpac",
    "abide_strategy": "filt_global",
    "target_column": "DX_GROUP",
    "class_map": {
      "ASD": 1,
      "TC": 0
    },
    "test_size": 0.15,
    "val_size": 0.15,
    "stratify": true
  },
  "mri_preprocessing": {
    "target_shape": [
      19900
    ],
    "target_voxel_size": [
      2.0,
      2.0,
      2.0
    ],
    "intensity_norm": "z_score",
    "apply_brain_mask": true,
    "apply_bias_correction": true,
    "smooth_fwhm": 6.0,
    "quality_threshold": 0.8,
    "augmentation": "AugmentationConfig(enabled=True, flip_prob=0.5, rotation_degrees=10, scale_range=[0.9, 1.1], noise_std=0.01, elastic_deform=False)"
  },
  "genetics_preprocessing": {
    "missing_threshold": 0.2,
    "variance_threshold": 0.01,
    "normalization": "robust",
    "selection_method": "combined",
    "n_top_features": 1000,
    "batch_correction": "combat",
    "dimensionality_reduction": "DimReductionConfig(method='pca', n_components=256, explained_variance_threshold=0.95)"
  },
  "mri_model": {
    "backbone": "medicalnet_resnet50",
    "pretrained": true,
    "freeze_backbone": false,
    "feature_dim": 512,
    "dropout": 0.3,
    "swin3d": "Swin3DConfig(embed_dim=96, depths=[2, 2, 6, 2], num_heads=[3, 6, 12, 24], window_size=[7, 7, 7], mlp_ratio=4.0, drop_path_rate=0.2)",
    "densenet3d": "DenseNet3DConfig(growth_rate=32, block_config=[6, 12, 24, 16], num_init_features=64, bn_size=4, drop_rate=0.2)"
  },
  "genetics_model": {
    "architecture": "transformer",
    "input_dim": 6,
    "hidden_dims": [
      512,
      256,
      128
    ],
    "feature_dim": 256,
    "dropout": 0.3,
    "num_heads": 8,
    "num_layers": 4
  },
  "fusion": {
    "method": "cross_attention",
    "mri_feature_dim": 512,
    "genetics_feature_dim": 256,
    "fusion_dim": 512,
    "num_heads": 8,
    "dropout": 0.3,
    "num_classes": 2,
    "gated": "GatedFusionConfig(gate_activation='sigmoid')",
    "cross_attention": "CrossAttentionConfig(num_layers=2, ffn_dim=1024)"
  },
  "training": {
    "batch_size": 8,
    "gradient_accumulation_steps": 4,
    "max_epochs": 100,
    "learning_rate": 0.0001,
    "weight_decay": 1e-05,
    "optimizer": "adamw",
    "scheduler": "cosine_warmup",
    "warmup_epochs": 5,
    "min_lr": 1e-07,
    "early_stopping": "EarlyStoppingConfig(enabled=True, patience=15, monitor='val_auc', mode='max', min_delta=0.0001)",
    "cross_validation": "CrossValidationConfig(enabled=True, n_folds=5, stratified=True, group_by_site=True)",
    "loss": "LossConfig(type='focal', focal_alpha=0.25, focal_gamma=2.0, label_smoothing=0.1)",
    "gradient_clip_norm": 1.0,
    "ema_decay": 0.999,
    "save_top_k": 3,
    "checkpoint_metric": "val_auc"
  },
  "evaluation": {
    "metrics": [
      "accuracy",
      "precision",
      "recall",
      "specificity",
      "f1",
      "roc_auc",
      "pr_auc",
      "balanced_accuracy",
      "mcc"
    ],
    "bootstrap_iterations": 1000,
    "significance_level": 0.05,
    "plot_roc": true,
    "plot_pr": true,
    "plot_confusion": true,
    "plot_calibration": true
  },
  "explainability": {
    "methods": [
      "gradcam",
      "gradcam_plus_plus",
      "integrated_gradients",
      "shap",
      "attention_rollout"
    ],
    "gradcam_layer": "auto",
    "shap_samples": 100,
    "ig_steps": 50,
    "save_heatmaps": true,
    "visualize_top_k_genes": 30
  },
  "hparam_tuning": {
    "enabled": false,
    "method": "optuna",
    "n_trials": 50,
    "timeout_hours": 12,
    "metric": "val_auc",
    "direction": "maximize",
    "pruner": "hyperband"
  },
  "tracking": {
    "mlflow": "MLflowConfig(enabled=True, experiment_name='ASD_Multimodal', tracking_uri='mlruns')",
    "wandb": "WandBConfig(enabled=False, project='asd-multimodal', entity=None)"
  },
  "logging": {
    "level": "INFO",
    "format": "%(asctime)s | %(levelname)s | %(name)s | %(message)s",
    "log_to_file": true,
    "log_dir": "results/logs"
  }
}
